ground_truth.title: Compare Professional Tax Software
ground_truth.main_content: Compare professional tax software products from TaxSlayer Pro. Find the perfect fit for your tax business. Discover TaxSlayer Pro's tax preparation software designed for tax practices of all types. Explore our range of packages including Web, Premium, and Classic. TaxSlayer Pro includes everything you need to succeed and grow your tax preparation business. Each package includes free, unlimited federal and state electronic filing, all state and local taxes, and top-rated technical support. Cloud-based software provides the convenience of a mobile tax office with comprehensive web-based functionality. Prepare and e-file individual tax returns seamlessly on multiple devices, ensuring flexibility and mobility. The Premium package includes a full corporate business suite allowing both federal and state electronic filing for forms 706, 709, 990, 1041, 1065, 1120, 1120-S, and 5500. Choose the best package for your business with early bird pricing through May 1: WEB $1,595, PREMIUM $1,695, CLASSIC $1,395. Not sure what software is best for your business? Our exclusive guide assists you in selecting the ideal software with an easy-to-follow approach. Pro Web + Corporate allows you to file individual returns with either cloud-based or desktop-based software, enjoying the flexibility of web-based software and the ability to file LLC and corporate returns with the desktop-based software.
with: Find the perfect fit for your tax business. Discover TaxSlayer Pro's tax preparation software designed for tax practices of all types.
Each of our tax software packages includes free, unlimited federal and state electronic filing, all state and local taxes, and our top-rated technical support.

Embrace the convenience of a mobile tax office with our comprehensive web-based software package. Prepare and e-file individual tax returns seamlessly on multiple devices, ensuring flexibility and mobility.
A full corporate business suite is included with our premium package, allowing both federal and state counterpart electronic filing for forms 706, 709, 990, 1041, 1065, 1120, 1120-S, and 5500.

Our newest package allows you to file individual returns with either cloud-based or desktop-based software. Enjoy the flexibility of the web-based software and the ability to file LLC and corporate returns with the desktop-based software.
